{{Quote|You have no idea what [[Boo Crew|those girls]] become.|[[Ezekiel Sims]] to [[Cassandra Webb]]|Madame Web (film)}}
'''Anya Corazón''' is a Hispanic/Latin American woman protected by [[Cassandra Webb]] from [[Ezekiel Sims]] so she can meet her destiny of becoming '''Araña'''.

==Biography==
''To be added''<ref name="MW"/>

== Physical Appearance ==

* In the final scenes, Anya  Corazón is seen wearing a Garry crop top shirt that reveals her bellybutton paired with black pants as part of his civilian attire till the end of the film. As Araña, she wears a specialized black and white suit in the future.

==Personality==
''To be added''

==Powers and Abilities==
===Possible Powers===
*'''Spider Physiology''': In the future, Anya Corazón would receive [[Spiders|spider]] powers, as seen by [[Ezekiel Sims]] and [[Madame Web]]'s [[Web of Life|visions]], and would use them to fight crime. 
**'''Superhuman Agility''': ''To be added''

===Abilities===
*'''Gifted Intelligence''': Anya is a gifted mathematician and can rapidly perform mental calculations. She does sudoku in her free time as well.

==Weapons==
*'''Bola''': Anya would wield a spider-like bola, which has a green glow.

==Equipment==
*'''[[Araña Suit]]''': A specialized black and white suit would be created and used by Anya Corazón to operate as the crime-fighting hero known as Araña.

==Facilities==
*'''Apartment''': Anya Corazón lives in the same apartment complex as [[Cassandra Webb]].

==Relationships==
{{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}}
===Family===
*Father
*Mother †

===Allies===
*[[Madame Web|Cassandra Webb/Madame Web]] - Friend and Savior
*[[Boo Crew]] - Friends
**[[Spider-Woman|Julia Cornwall/Spider-Woman]]
**[[Spider-Girl|Mattie Franklin/Spider-Girl]]
*[[Ben Parker]]
*[[Mary Parker]]
{{Col-2}}

===Enemies===
*[[Ezekiel Sims]] † - Attempted Killer
{{Col-end}}

==Trivia==
*"Araña" is the Hispanic/Latin American word for [[Spiders|spider]].
*In the comics, '''Aña Sofía Corazón''', also known as Anya Corazon, gained spider powers from a tattoo one of two mystical clans, the Spider Society, gave her, going by Araña (her late mother's maiden name) and later '''[[Spider-Girl]]'''.

==Behind the Scenes==
*[[Angela Cipra]] was a stunt double for [[Isabela Merced]] in the role of Araña.
